passives.name: Energized
passives.effects: Moving and basic attacking generates ''Energize'' stacks, up to 100.

passives.name: Polarity
passives.effects: Your {{tip|Energized}} attacks against targets not hit by your previous ''Energized'' attack do not consume any ''Energize'' stacks on-hit.

passives.name: Dynamo
passives.effects: When fully {{tip|Energized}}, your next basic attack deals {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} [[on-hit]] equal to {{as|13% of the target's '''current''' health}}.

effects_structured.raw: Moving and basic attacking generates ''Energize'' stacks, up to 100.
Your {{tip Energized}} attacks against targets not hit by your previous ''Energized'' attack do not consume any ''Energize'' stacks on-hit.
When fully {{tip Energized}}, your next basic attack deals {{as '''bonus''' magic damage}} [[on-hit]] equal to {{as 13% of the target's '''current''' health}}.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Fulmination uses Energize stack accumulation (up to 100), with Dynamo consuming a fully charged Energized basic attack to apply current-health bonus magic damage.
Player-visible behavior: Polarity preserves Energize charges when changing to a different target than the previous Energized-hit target, enabling consecutive charged hits across target swaps.
Dynamo ratio is verified at 13% of target current health in current page-level patch history.
